seo.title: Dental Practice Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your dental office. Route unhappy patients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Dental Practices
hero.subheading: Patients compare practices online before they book. ReviewFlo helps you collect steady Google reviews without awkward in-chair asks.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Dental Practice Faces

items.heading: One bad review outweighs dozens of quiet happy patients
items.body: People read Google before they choose a dentist. A single frustrated review can dominate what strangers see.

items.heading: HIPAA makes public praise feel risky for patients
items.body: Even happy patients may not want treatment details online. Generic review asks often get ignored.

items.heading: Front desk staff are already slammed at checkout
items.body: There is no extra time to coach every patient on how to leave a review.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Dental Practices

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after the visit, not during treatment
items.body: Send a text or email link when checkout is done, so the ask does not interrupt care.

items.heading: Catch complaints before they go public
items.body: Low ratings route to private feedback so you can respond without a public flame war.

items.heading: Steady requests without a marketing team
items.body: The same simple flow after every appointment. No complicated setup.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we ask for reviews in a HIPAA-conscious way?
items.a: Yes. Focus requests on the visit experience and avoid clinical details. Patients choose what they share publicly.

items.q: What happens when a patient is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going straight to Google.

items.q: Do we need to integrate with our practice management software?
items.a: No. You can send requests manually, or use the API when you are ready.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow: requests, private feedback for unhappy clients, Google for happy ones. ReviewFlo is priced for small practices.

items.q: Does this work for multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. The AI plan supports multiple locations with separate dashboards and links.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Dental Practice Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
